title: User Registration Success
description: Verify user registration succeeds with valid data and user role selection for student and instructor.

steps.description: Navigate to registration page
Input valid first name, last name, email, password, confirm password, and select user role student
Submit registration form
Verify account created successfully and email exists in database with correct role
Repeat registration with user role instructor
Verify instructor account created successfully

title: User Registration Validation Errors
description: Verify registration fails with invalid input data or missing required fields.

steps.description: Navigate to registration page
Input invalid email format and short password
Submit registration form
Verify validation errors received for email and password length
Omit mandatory fields such as firstName and userRole
Verify validation errors for missing required fields

title: User Login Success
description: Verify login succeeds with correct credentials and returns JWT session with expiry.

steps.description: Navigate to login page
Input registered email and correct password
Submit login form
Verify login successful, JWT token issued, and session expiry is 30 days

title: User Login Failure
description: Verify login fails with invalid credentials and proper error is returned.

steps.description: Navigate to login page
Input unregistered email or incorrect password
Submit login form
Verify login failed with status 401 and error message invalid credentials

title: Course CRUD Operations by Instructor
description: Verify that an instructor can create, read, update, and delete courses, including setting category, pricing, thumbnails, and publish status, with ownership enforcement.

steps.description: Login as instructor
Create new course with valid title, description, category, price, and thumbnail
Verify course is created and associated with instructor
Retrieve course details and verify correct data
Update course details including price and publish status
Verify course update is reflected
Delete the course
Verify course no longer exists

title: Course CRUD Permission Enforcement
description: Verify only course owner instructor can update or delete course, others receive forbidden errors.

steps.description: Login as Instructor A and create a course
Login as Instructor B
Attempt to update course created by Instructor A
Verify update is rejected with 403 Forbidden
Attempt to delete course created by Instructor A
Verify delete is rejected with 403 Forbidden

title: Module Management CRUD
description: Verify creation, editing, reordering, publication, and retrieval of course modules with ownership checks.

steps.description: Login as course instructor
Create multiple modules within a course
Verify modules are listed in created order
Reorder modules and change publish status
Verify module order and publish states updated accordingly
Attempt to access modules for a course not owned
Verify access is denied with 403 Forbidden

title: Lesson Management CRUD and Publishing
description: Verify lesson creation, editing, ordering, publishing, and progress tracking within modules, enforcing ownership permissions.

steps.description: Login as instructor
Create lessons within a module, setting order and publish status
Verify lessons are created with correct metadata
Edit lesson content and reorder lessons
Verify lesson updates are persisted
Attempt lesson management on module not owned
Verify access denied with 403 Forbidden

title: Course Enrollment Workflows for Free and Paid Courses
description: Verify students can successfully enroll in free courses instantly and paid courses via MockPay payment simulation.

steps.description: Login as student
Enroll in a free course
Verify enrollment record created with status active
Enroll in a paid course and initiate MockPay payment
Verify payment simulation is triggered and pending enrollment is created
Simulate MockPay payment confirmation webhook with valid data
Verify enrollment status updated to active after payment

title: Enrollment Payment Status and Error Handling
description: Verify payment status checks return correct information and invalid payment data results in errors.

steps.description: Request payment status with valid referenceId
Verify payment status response returns expected status
Request payment status with non-existing referenceId
Verify 404 Not Found error returned
Send MockPay payment webhook with invalid data
Verify 400 Bad Request error returned

title: Quiz Attempt with Time Limits and Max Attempts Enforcement
description: Verify quiz attempts respect time limits, max attempts, and randomized question order with accurate scoring and pass/fail indication.

steps.description: Login as student
Start a quiz and verify questions are randomized
Submit answers within time limit
Verify auto-grading occurs and score, pass/fail status returned
Attempt to start quiz again until max attempts reached
Verify further attempts are rejected
Simulate submitting quiz after time expired
Verify attempt marked expired and not graded

title: Progress Tracking Updates and Reports
description: Verify lesson watch time updates, state transitions, and generation of accurate progress reports for students.

steps.description: Login as student and start lesson
Send watch progress updates with states started, in-progress, completed and last watched time
Verify watch records updated accordingly
Request progress report for course
Verify report reflects accurate completion and watch times

title: Certificate Generation on Course Completion
description: Verify PDF certificates are generated only when 100% course progress and all required quizzes are passed, enforcing access restrictions and rate limits.

steps.description: Login as student who completed course and passed all quizzes
Request certificate download for course
Verify certificate PDF is generated and accessible
Request certificate again rapidly exceeding rate limits
Verify rate limit exceeded error (429) is returned
Login as student who did not complete course or failed quizzes
Request certificate download
Verify access denied with 403 Forbidden

title: Admin Dashboard Data Integrity and Access Control
description: Verify admin dashboard shows correct statistics and allows management operations only for admin users.

steps.description: Login as admin
Access admin dashboard page
Verify dashboard statistics include total users, courses, enrollments, and revenue with correct numbers
Perform bulk user status changes and course updates
Verify bulk operations succeed and data updated accordingly
Login as non-admin user and access admin dashboard
Verify access denied with 403 Forbidden

title: User Profile Management - View and Edit Profile
description: Verify user can retrieve their profile data, update editable fields, and change password with validation.

steps.description: Login as user
Fetch current user profile
Verify profile data returned contains expected fields
Update profile fields such as firstName and lastName
Verify updates are saved and reflected on subsequent fetch
Change password with correct current password and compliant new password
Verify password changed successfully
Attempt password change with incorrect current password
Verify error returned

title: User Profile Management - Avatar Upload Validation
description: Verify avatar image uploads accept valid files within limits and reject incorrect formats or oversized files.

steps.description: Login as user
Upload avatar image within allowed size and valid format
Verify upload succeeds and avatar is updated
Upload avatar image exceeding size limit
Verify 413 Payload Too Large error returned
Upload avatar with invalid file type
Verify 400 Bad Request error returned

title: Course Reviews Submission and Admin Moderation
description: Verify students can submit course reviews and ratings and that admins can moderate (approve, reject) these reviews.

steps.description: Login as student
Submit review and rating for an enrolled course
Verify review is stored with pending status
Login as admin
Access admin reviews moderation panel
Approve and reject submitted reviews
Verify reviews status updated and published/hidden accordingly

title: Category Management CRUD by Admin
description: Verify admin users can create, edit, delete, and list categories for course organization.

steps.description: Login as admin
Create a new category with valid name and description
Verify category is created and listed
Update existing category
Verify category updates are saved
Delete an existing category
Verify category is no longer listed

title: Public Course Catalog Search and Filtering
description: Verify that the public course catalog can be searched and filtered by categories, with correct course previews displayed.

steps.description: Navigate to public course catalog
Perform search with keywords
Verify search results contain matching courses with correct preview details
Apply category filters
Verify results filtered correctly by selected categories

title: Authorization and Permission Checks
description: Verify the role-based access control system correctly allows or forbids access to resources based on role and ownership to prevent IDOR attacks.

steps.description: Login as student
Attempt to access instructor-only APIs or modify others' data
Verify access is denied with 403 Forbidden
Login as instructor
Attempt to modify courses or modules not owned
Verify access denied with 403 Forbidden
Login as admin
Access and modify any user, course, or enrollment
Verify admin override capabilities work correctly
